nasb.text: But I will also judge the nation whom they will serve, and afterward they will come out with many possessions.

esv.text: But I will bring judgment on the nation that they serve, and afterward they shall come out with great possessions.

cnv.text: 他們所要服事的那國，我要親自懲罰。後來他們必帶著很多財物，從那裡出來。

ccb.text: 但我必惩罚奴役他们的国家，之后他们必带着大量的财物离开那里。

csbs.text: 但我将审判他们所服事的那个国家；此后他们将带着大量的财物出来。
